project_type: Flutter cross-platform app (Android, iOS, Web) for authentication and session management
build_system: Flutter SDK (^3.11.1), pubspec.yaml for dependency management, no CI workflows
test_framework: flutter_test with glados for property-based testing. Tests mirror lib/ structure in test/. Mock implementations of abstract service interfaces. Tests organized per-concern (e.g. auth_manager_sign_in_test.dart).
verification_instructions: 1. Run 'flutter pub get' to install dependencies. 2. Run 'flutter analyze' for static analysis. 3. Run 'flutter test' to execute all tests.
setup_instructions: Flutter SDK is NOT pre-installed in the sandbox. Must install Flutter SDK first. Steps: 1. Install Flutter via git clone or snap. 2. Run 'flutter pub get'. 3. Verify with 'flutter analyze' and 'flutter test'.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode - full access for package installation. Flutter SDK is NOT pre-installed (not in sandbox_details). Dart SDK also not pre-installed. Must install Flutter SDK before running any flutter commands. No Android/iOS/Chrome emulators available for run commands, but flutter test and analyze work headless.
contribution_requirements: Compliance: Only standard encryption allowed (TLS 1.2+). No custom crypto. flutterrific_opentelemetry uses standard OTLP/gRPC and OTLP/HTTP protocols with TLS, which is compliant. Must not distribute in France. Keep compliance docs updated when adding deps involving cryptography - OTLP uses TLS for transport, which is standard.
key_patterns: State management: Provider + ChangeNotifier. Platform abstraction: conditional imports (dart.library.js_interop). Service interfaces: abstract classes with DI via constructors. Entry point: main.dart uses runZonedGuarded for error handling, WidgetsFlutterBinding.ensureInitialized(), MultiProvider. Existing debug logging via DebugLog static class. Files use snake_case, web-specific files suffixed _web.dart, stubs _stub.dart.
directory_structure: lib/ - main app code (main.dart entry point, models/, services/, views/). test/ - mirrors lib/ structure. scripts/ - compliance_check.sh. assets/ - app icon. .kiro/steering/ - project steering files (compliance.md, structure.md, tech.md, product.md).
